mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER (UM_CODE, UM_USERID, UM_PWD, UM_UIS_CODE, UM_REG_TYPE, UM_NAME, UM_REG_USERID, UM_USEYN, UM_FREE_ACCOUNT) VALUES (CONCAT('UM',LPAD(#{umCode},11,'0')), #{umUserid}, PASSWORD(#{umUserid}), #{umUisCode}, #{umRegType}, #{umName}, #{umRegUserid}, #{umUseyn}, #{umFreeAccount})
